name: apex-spec
description: Specification-driven workflow system for AI-assisted development in Codex.

interface.shortDescription: Plan, implement, validate, and ship scoped spec-driven sessions.
interface.longDescription: Apex Spec System packages a 24-command specification-driven workflow for Codex. It guides initialization, PRD creation, phase and session planning, implementation, code review, validation, documentation, and utility workflows such as copush and Docker builds.
defaultPrompt: Use Apex Spec to plan the next session.
Initialize the spec system in this repo.
Validate the current Apex Spec session.
